name: us-tax-collector-tea-party
description: Tax Collector vs. Tea Party — Unit 2 U.S. History arcade game (TEKS 8.4A, 8.20B, 8.29B). Five British acts fly at you in six minutes: tap what each one really did, then pick how the colonists really hit back — while the game quietly fixes the 'Tea Act = new tax' misconception. Server-authoritative Socket.IO backend with a live Teacher Command Center.
comment: No npm workspaces: this drive is exFAT, which cannot host the symlinks/junctions workspace linking requires. server/ and client/ install independently; `npm install` here cascades via postinstall.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server --no-fund --no-audit && npm install --prefix client --no-fund --no-audit
